nasb.text: And He said to him, “ ‘You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind.’

esv.text: And he said to him, “You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind.

cnv.text: 他回答：“你要全心、全性、全意愛主你的　神。

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“‘你要全心、全情、全意爱主——你的上帝’，

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“‘你要以全心、全灵、全意爱主——你的神’，
